name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----

EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N   (* number of processes *)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
\* Process identifiers are integers from 1 .. N
ProcessIds == 1 .. N

(* States a process may occupy *)
StateVals == {"Idle","Trying","Critical"}

VARIABLES procStates    (* mapping from each process id to its current state *), p, procStates, q

vars == <<procStates>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
TypeInvariant ==
    /\ procStates : [ProcessIds -> StateVals]

Init ==
    /\ TYPE_OK
    /\ procStates = [p \in ProcessIds |-> "Idle"]

Next ==
    \/ TRYING(p)      \* A process moves from Idle to Trying
       FORALL p IN ProcessIds:
           (IF p' = p THEN 
                IF procStates[p] # "Idle" THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE


    \/ ENTER_CRITICAL(q)
        FORALL q IN ProcessIds:
          (IF q' = q THEN 
               IF procStates[q] = "Trying"
                  /\ NOT EXISTS r \in ProcessIds :
                        r /= q => procStates[r] = "Critical"
              THEN "Critical" ELSE FALSE


TRYING(p) ==
     /\ p \in ProcessIds
     /\ procStates[p] = "Idle"

ENTER_CRITICAL(q) ==
     /\ q \in ProcessIds

Spec == Init /\ []<>(NEXT)_vars

====
